items.title: Guard Alijah Martin has agreed to a two-year, $4.8 million deal to return to the Toronto Raptors, sources tell ESPN. Martin was a second-round pick to Toronto in 2025 and enters a multiyear deal after the team and his agents, Todd Ramasar and Jaafar Choufani of Life Sports Agency
items.author: Shams Charania Tweets
items.body_excerpt: Guard Alijah Martin has agreed to a two-year, $4.8 million deal to return to the Toronto Raptors, sources tell ESPN. Martin was a second-round pick to Toronto in 2025 and enters a multiyear deal after the team and his agents, Todd Ramasar and Jaafar Choufani of Life Sports Agency finalized terms.

items.author: Bobby Krivitsky
items.body_excerpt:
My thoughts on what the Celtics signing Mike Conley could mean for a potential Anfernee Simons reunion:

One can't ignore financial side of roster building, or that teams must plan with more than one year in mind. However, to me, this largely depends on Payton Pritchard's role next season.

items.title: The real win of the Lakers using cap space this summer:
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
The real win of the Lakers using cap space this summer:

We finally get to remove seven old cap holds when they renounce the players for space! This list includes:

Carmelo Anthony
Avery Bradley
Jared Dudley
Wayne Ellington
Dwight Howard
Markieff Morris
Dion Waiters
